response.original_title: Can I Dispute a Priceline Charge and Win? Here’s the Truth
response.overview: 100% you can dispute a charge from Priceline. Help desk 24/7 ✈️ US +(1_(888)-->423→4029)  Make sure to first check your booking details and cancellation policy. ✔ +1{888}{423}{4029} || ✔ +44{203}{836}{5747} (OTA)  If the issue remains unresolved, your credit card issuer can help you initiate a chargeback.
response.title: Can I Dispute a Priceline Charge and Win? Here’s the Truth
